NOTICE OF TENDER

Procurement Number: PP1-TEST-2026-001
Title: Supply and Delivery of Test Equipment
Issuing Authority: Test Corporation
Submission Deadline: 2026-07-15

This is a synthetic test notice for PP1 testing purposes only.

Scope:
- Supply of 10 units of testing equipment
- Installation and commissioning
- 2-year warranty period

Eligibility:
- Valid business registration required
- ISO 9001 certification preferred
- Prior experience in similar projects
